diagram_title: Govern Tool-Output Carriage By Token Budget

activities.title: Gauge Result Token Cost
activities.description: Estimate the tool result's token cost (not byte length) using the existing token estimator, so the decision is in the same currency as the context window it protects (DD-1).

activities.title: Decide Externalization By Headroom
activities.description: Compare the estimate against min(absolute floor, fraction of remaining context window); externalize above it, tightening as the window fills (DD-2).

activities.title: Externalize And Mint Handle
activities.description: Write the full body to the output store and mint a stable, re-accessible handle (not a raw fs path); produce a bounded preview. One seam for built-in and MCP results (DD-4/DD-5).

activities.title: Emit Bounded Handle Every Send
activities.description: On every prompt build, serialize a redirected part as handle + preview — never the full body again — so cold re-sends stay bounded (DD-3).

activities.title: Resolve Handle On Demand
activities.description: When the model needs the full result, resolve the handle (Read/Grep/recall-by-handle); the handle survives compaction so a post-amnesia agent can still fetch it (DD-4).

arrows.label: gate policy: min(absolute floor, headroom fraction × remaining window)
stored full body keyed by handle
prompt serializer rule: redirected part → handle+preview only
